notes: Core mechanics work (movement, shooting, shields, mystery ship, waves) but aliens are plain colored rectangles with dot eyes instead of classic pixel sprites, formation offset starts oddly at x=120 making layout feel off, and shield generation logic has a bug producing sparse/incorrect bunker shapes.
A very solid implementation with destructible shields, proper alien speed scaling, and sound effects, though it lacks proper sprite art and has a minor array-splicing bug during iteration.
A solid and mostly complete Space Invaders clone, but simplified visuals, some collision/array-splice edge-case risks, and missing classic polish keep it well short of perfection.
